sections.paragraph: with suff. אֶבְלִי m. (from אָבַל No. I), mourning, Est 4:3 9:22 specially for the dead, Gen 27:41, אֵבֶל יָחִיד “mourning for an only (son),” Amo 8:10 Jer 6:26 Mic 1:8, וְאֵבֶלּ כִּבְנֹות יַעֲנָה “and (I will make) a mourning like the ostriches,” which make a wailing cry; עָשָׂה אֵבֶל לְּ “to make a mourning for any one,” Gen 50:10.
